description: EaseMyTrip is an online travel platform for booking flights, hotels, buses, trains, cabs, holidays, activities, and related travel services. It also operates a B2B agent platform for travel partners.
summary: EaseMyTrip exposes a public MCP server at `https://emt-mcp-server.easemytrip.com/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL API docs or CLI were found on easemytrip.com, though its B2B agents page mentions internal/partner-facing APIs without developer documentation.
